summary: Comprehensive testing completed for Dams Car Rental iteration 3 (location-based car search). All 36 backend API tests passed (100%). All frontend flows tested and working correctly. New feature: city filtering on home screen with location pills, car cards show pickup location in blue. Combined filters (city + category + search) work perfectly. No critical issues found.
seed_data_creation: No additional seed data created. App uses existing 6 cars across 4 cities and 8 locations.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 3 features all working. New: Location-based car search with city filtering. Backend: GET /api/cars?city={city} filters by pickup/dropoff location name or address. Frontend: Home screen has horizontal scrollable location pills (All Locations, Punta Cana, Santo Domingo, Miami, New York) derived from /api/locations. Car cards show pickup_location.name in blue. Active filters show result count and Clear button. Combined filters (city + category + search) work together. All previous features still working (auth, cars, bookings, admin panel, locations management).

auth.test_register_success: PASSED - User registration creates account with token
auth.test_login_success: PASSED - Admin login returns token and role

cars.test_get_cars_with_city_filter_miami: PASSED - Miami filter returns 2 cars (Mercedes-Benz S-Class, Porsche 911 Carrera)
cars.test_get_cars_with_city_filter_punta_can: PASSED - Punta Cana filter returns 2 cars (Tesla Model 3, Range Rover Sport)

cars.test_get_cars_with_city_filter_new_york: PASSED - New York filter returns 1 car (Toyota Camry)
cars.test_get_cars_without_city_filter: PASSED - No city filter returns all 6 cars
cars.test_get_cars_with_city_and_category_fil: PASSED - Miami + Luxury returns 1 car (Mercedes-Benz S-Class)
cars.test_get_all_cars_admin: PASSED - Admin can access all cars
cars.test_create_car_admin: PASSED - Admin can create car, verified with GET
cars.test_update_car_admin: PASSED - Admin can update car, verified with GET
cars.test_delete_car_admin: PASSED - Admin can delete car, verified with GET 404

bookings.test_create_booking_authenticated: PASSED - Authenticated user can create booking, verified with GET
bookings.test_get_bookings_authenticated: PASSED - User can retrieve their bookings

locations.test_get_locations_with_city_filter: PASSED - City filter works (2 Punta Cana locations)
locations.test_get_locations_cities_list: PASSED - Returns 4 cities: Miami, New York, Punta Cana, Santo Domingo
locations.test_create_location_admin: PASSED - Admin can create location, verified with GET
locations.test_update_location_admin: PASSED - Admin can update location, verified with GET
locations.test_delete_location_admin: PASSED - Admin can delete location, verified with GET 404
